title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 99.225 - Funds to be used only for certain purposes
text:
99.225.  Funds to be used only for certain purposes. — No funds derived from the United States Department of Housing and Urban Development for the subsidization, directly or indirectly, of very low and low-income housing may be used by any housing authority, directly or indirectly, for any of the nonhousing related activities or housing projects for moderate income persons described in sections 99.010 to 99.230, unless authorized by federal statutes or regulation.
(L. 1986 S.B. 767)
